title: Changelog
text: notable changes project documented file. format based Keep Changelog project follows Semantic Versioning.

title: Changelog
text: Typed serializable query plans, strict filter/select pushdown, feature resolution, bounded multi-feature fetch, provenance-aware results. Artifact listing/download verification, conversion planning, biological object adapters, relation/collection helpers, server capability flags. Align gene resolution server GET contract, use Artifact-ID download routes, consume cursor pages, expose Arrow/JSONL streaming hooks.

title: Changelog
text: Expose metadata-first query, artifact, conversion, collection APIs preserving existing Resource handle contract.

title: Changelog
text: Add Phase 2–5 contract coverage fetch, conversion guards, artifacts, collections, cursor pages, capability-gated batch/axis paths, structured API errors.

title: Changelog
text: Add compatibility entrypoints used shennong-db clients: sn_set_api_url, sn_get_api_url, sn_set_api_token, sn_get_api_token. Add compatibility helpers sn_query_spec, sn_query, sn_fetch_genes. Add sn_plot_survival legacy bearer-token handling data handles.

title: Changelog
text: Preserve legacy query token field (api_url, token) sn_load_data() emit Authorization requesting /v1/query.

title: Changelog
text: Add sn_admin_token() configure read admin token options (fallback SHENNONG_ADMIN_API_KEY). Add optional admin_token argument sn_register_dataset(), sn_ingest(), sn_upload_dataset(). Send admin token X-Shennong-Admin-Key admin operations.

title: Changelog
text: Extend internal HTTP helpers support layered request headers include admin header mutation endpoints.

title: Changelog
text: Add man page entries sn_admin_token() admin_token parameters.

title: Changelog
text: Add coverage admin token storage header generation behavior.

title: Changelog
text: Initial package scaffold (ShennongData) lazy data loading, querying plotting helpers Shennong Data Server.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Duan S (2026). ShennongData: Lazy R Client Shennong Data Server. R package version 0.2.0, https://zerostwo.github.io/shennong-data/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {ShennongData: Lazy R Client for Shennong Data Server},   author = {Songqi Duan},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0},   url = {https://zerostwo.github.io/shennong-data/}, }

what: Lazy R Client for Shennong Data Server
title: Lazy R Client for Shennong Data Server
text: ShennongData lazy R client ShennongDB. discovers resource metadata first downloads data explicitly materialize query.

title: Lazy R Client for Shennong Data Server
Lazy R Client for Shennong Data Server
text: Connect ShennongDB server create metadata-resource handle: Choose view build lazy query collecting data: Use bounded fetches artifacts larger data transfers: See pkgdown site complete function reference.
code: library(ShennongData)  con <- sn_connect(   "https://your-shennongdb.example",   token = Sys.getenv("SHENNONG_TOKEN") )  x <- sn_load_data("toil", connection = con) x sn_schema(x) sn_layers(x) observations <- sn_obs(x) expression <- sn_assay(x)  sn_show_query(observations) result <- collect(observations) sn_fetch_data(x) sn_artifacts(x)

title: Metadata-first ShennongDB Resource handles — ShennongData
text: Connect ShennongDB, discover Resource, select metadata assay view without materializing data values.

title: Metadata-first ShennongDB Resource handles — ShennongData
code: sn_connect(url = sn_server_url(), token = NULL, profile = "default",   cache_dir = tools::R_user_dir("ShennongData", "cache"), timeout = 60,   retries = 3L, throttle = 4, user_agent = NULL, set_default = TRUE) sn_load_data(resource, version = NULL,   view = c("auto", "observations", "assay", "resource"),   connection = sn_connection(), refresh = FALSE,   validate = c("metadata", "capabilities", "none"), ...) sn_obs(x) sn_var(x) sn_assay(x, assay = NULL, layer = NULL)

title: Metadata-first ShennongDB Resource handles — ShennongData
text: url ShennongDB base URL. token session-bearer token. profile Authentication profile name. cache_dir Metadata cache directory. timeout Request timeout seconds. retries Maximum retry attempts. throttle Maximum requests per second. user_agent Optional user-agent string. set_default Whether use connection default. resource Resource ID. version Optional Resource version. view Resource view return. connection negotiated ShennongDB connection. refresh Whether refresh cached metadata. validate Metadata validation level. ... Additional arguments reserved compatible methods. x ShennongData handle. assay optional declared assay. layer optional declared measurement.

title: Metadata-first ShennongDB Resource handles — ShennongData
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ sn_connect("http://127.0.0.1:8000") toil <- sn_load_data("toil") dim(toil) dim(sn_assay(toil)) } # }
